name: multi_search
description: Search multiple patterns in a single filesystem pass with working directory support.

parameters.name: --dir=DIR
parameters.description: Working directory to cd into before searching

parameters.name: file_or_dir
parameters.description: File or directory to search in

parameters.name: patterns
parameters.description: One or more patterns to search for

parameters.name: --head=N, --max-results=N
parameters.description: Limit output to first N matching lines per pattern

examples.expected: Lists up to 20 function and type declarations in Go files

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses multiple grep calls into a single step, saving N-1 agent steps, and --head replaces piped head calls.
